tail_1_leadChange_0.text: A NEW leader at the table!

tail_1_everybodyHit_1.text: A clean sweep — everyone landed it!

tail_1_carnage_0.text: What a round — almost nobody survived!

tail_1_tightRace_0.text: It is NECK and NECK at the top!
tail_1_tightRace_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'NECK and NECK up top!' — same punch, fewer words.

tail_1_tightRace_1.text: This one's coming down to the wire!

tail_1_kickoff_0.text: Shuffle up and deal — let's play!

tail_1_trailing_0.text: Bringing up the rear — plenty of game left!
tail_1_trailing_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Bringing up the rear, folks!' — drops the redundant 'plenty of game left.'

tail_1_reigningChamp_0.text: The reigning champion is at the table!

tail_1_freshGame_0.text: A fresh scorepad! Anything can happen!

tail_1_freshGame_1.text: New game, clean slate — good luck, everyone!

tail_1_perfect_0.text: Still PERFECT! Not a single miss all game!
tail_1_perfect_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Still PERFECT! Never missed!' — same punch, half the words.

tail_1_perfect_1.text: Flawless! The bids just keep landing!

tail_1_hotStreak_0.text: On FIRE! Another bid, another hit!

tail_1_hotStreak_1.text: The streak continues — they simply do not miss!
tail_1_hotStreak_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'The streak continues — they don't miss!' — cuts 'simply.'

tail_1_coldStreak_0.text: The cold streak continues. Thoughts and prayers.

tail_1_coldStreak_1.text: Ice cold! Somebody grab a blanket!

tail_1_coldStreak_2.text: Another miss! The wheels are wobbling, folks.

tail_1_coldStreak_3.text: The luck has GOT to turn soon.

tail_1_coldStreak_4.text: A rough patch, folks — hang tight.

tail_1_bigRound_0.text: BOOM! The round of the game!

tail_1_bigRound_1.text: A MASSIVE round! The scorepad is smoking!

tail_1_zeroSpecialist_0.text: Another perfect zero! An artist at work!

tail_1_zeroSpecialist_1.text: Bid nothing, took nothing — poetry, folks!

tail_1_boldestBidder_0.text: The boldest bidder at the table — no fear!
tail_1_boldestBidder_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Boldest bid at the table — no fear!' — drops the redundant article.

tail_1_winner_0.text: That's the GAME! We have a CHAMPION!

tail_1_winner_1.text: It's all over — what a performance!

tail_1_lastPlace_0.text: And hey — somebody had to come in last.
tail_1_lastPlace_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Somebody had to come in last!' — drops the throat-clearing 'And hey.'

tail_2_leadChange_1.text: There's been a coup at the top!

tail_2_nosedive_0.text: That sound you hear is a score screaming!
tail_2_nosedive_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'That sound? A score, screaming!' — same joke, fewer words.

tail_2_everybodyHit_0.text: Everybody hit?! BORING! Where's the drama?!

tail_2_carnage_1.text: A massacre! Somebody call for help!

tail_2_kickoff_0.text: Deal 'em up. Let's see who disappoints first!
tail_2_kickoff_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Deal 'em up — who disappoints first?' — cuts 'let's see.'

tail_2_chasing_0.text: Closing in — the leader should be nervous!

tail_2_chasing_2.text: Plotting a takeover as we speak!

tail_2_trailing_0.text: Holding down last place like it's a job!
tail_2_trailing_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Holding down last place — full time!' — same joke, tighter.

tail_2_trailing_1.text: The basement has a new tenant!

tail_2_leading_1.text: First place! Enjoy it while it lasts!

tail_2_leading_2.text: Enjoying the view from the top!

tail_2_reigningChamp_0.text: The champ is back to defend the crown!
tail_2_reigningChamp_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Back to defend the crown!' — drops the redundant 'the champ is.'

tail_2_reigningChamp_1.text: Reigning champion — target on their back!

tail_2_freshGame_0.text: Clean slate! Time for some questionable bids!

tail_2_freshGame_1.text: New game! Zero points, zero excuses!

tail_2_perfect_0.text: Still perfect! Save some glory for the rest of the table!
tail_2_perfect_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Still perfect! Save some glory, folks!' — cuts 'for the rest of the table.'

tail_2_perfect_1.text: Perfection! This is getting suspicious, folks!

tail_2_perfect_2.text: Flawless — and just a little smug about it!
tail_2_perfect_2.suggestion: Trim to: 'Flawless — and a little smug!' — drops 'just... about it.'

tail_2_hotStreak_0.text: Red hot! The table is in TROUBLE!

tail_2_coldStreak_0.text: The confidence and the scorecard are no longer on speaking terms!
tail_2_coldStreak_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Confidence and scorecard aren't speaking!' — same joke, way fewer words. Also duplicates the 'not on speaking terms' gag used in variant 3 — if kept, swap variant 3 for something fresh.

tail_2_coldStreak_1.text: Another miss! Hide the scorecard from the children!
tail_2_coldStreak_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Another miss! Hide the scorecard, kids!' — same gag, fewer words.

tail_2_coldStreak_2.text: The bids and the cards are not on speaking terms!
tail_2_coldStreak_2.suggestion: Similar to variant 1 — both use the 'not on speaking terms' joke. Consider replacing with: 'That bid filed for divorce from reality!'

tail_2_coldStreak_3.text: Cold enough to see your breath over there!
tail_2_coldStreak_3.suggestion: Trim to: 'Cold enough to see your breath!' — drops 'over there.'

tail_2_zeroSpecialist_0.text: Another zero! Doing nothing has never looked so good!
tail_2_zeroSpecialist_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Another zero! Doing nothing looks GOOD!' — cuts 'has never... so.'

tail_2_zeroSpecialist_1.text: Zero called, zero taken. Menace behavior!

tail_2_boldestBidder_0.text: Huge bid AGAIN! Confidence level: unearned!

tail_2_boldestBidder_1.text: The audacity is off the charts!

tail_2_winner_0.text: It's OVER! Act like you've been here before!
tail_2_winner_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'It's OVER! Act like you've been here!' — drops trailing 'before.'

tail_2_winner_1.text: The winner! Everyone else — take notes!

tail_2_lastPlace_0.text: Dead last! But hey — great snacks tonight.

tail_2_lastPlace_1.text: Last place! We've alerted the authorities.

tail_3_leadChange_0.text: A HOSTILE TAKEOVER at the top!

tail_3_nosedive_1.text: That wasn't a round, that was a DEMOLITION!
tail_3_nosedive_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'That wasn't a round — a DEMOLITION!' — cuts the repeated 'that was.'

tail_3_everybodyHit_0.text: A PERFECT round?! Who ARE you people?!

tail_3_carnage_1.text: The deck committed CRIMES that round!

tail_3_tightRace_0.text: A KNIFE FIGHT at the top of the table!
tail_3_tightRace_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'A KNIFE FIGHT at the top!' — drops 'of the table.'

tail_3_tightRace_1.text: Nobody breathe — this is TOO close!

tail_3_kickoff_0.text: Shuffle up — the CARNAGE begins NOW!

tail_3_kickoff_1.text: Round ONE! Let the chaos COMMENCE!

tail_3_chasing_0.text: The hunt is ON! Nowhere to hide!

tail_3_chasing_3.text: Closing FAST — someone warn the leader!

tail_3_trailing_0.text: ANCHORED to the bottom of this table!

tail_3_trailing_2.text: The basement is FULLY furnished now!

tail_3_leading_1.text: On TOP and rubbing it in!

tail_3_leading_3.text: KING of the mountain — for now!

tail_3_reigningChamp_0.text: The CHAMPION walks among you! BOW!

tail_3_reigningChamp_1.text: Back to defend the title — and talking TRASH!
tail_3_reigningChamp_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Back to defend the title — talking TRASH!' — drops the 'and.'

tail_3_freshGame_0.text: A NEW battle begins! May the odds ignore your history!
tail_3_freshGame_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'A NEW battle! Forget your history!' — cuts 'begins... may the odds ignore.'

tail_3_perfect_0.text: PERFECT AGAIN! Everyone else can GO HOME! It's OVER!
tail_3_perfect_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'PERFECT AGAIN! Everyone else, GO HOME!' — cuts the redundant 'It's OVER!' tack-on.

tail_3_hotStreak_0.text: They simply CANNOT be stopped! This is a HOSTILE TAKEOVER!
tail_3_hotStreak_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'They CANNOT be stopped! A HOSTILE TAKEOVER!' — cuts 'simply' and 'this is.'

tail_3_hotStreak_1.text: Another one! Have MERCY on this table!

tail_3_hotStreak_2.text: A RAMPAGE! No one is safe!

tail_3_coldStreak_0.text: I have seen CAR CRASHES with better outcomes!
tail_3_coldStreak_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'I've seen CAR CRASHES with better outcomes!' — contracts 'I have' to 'I've.'

tail_3_coldStreak_1.text: The deck is just BULLYING them at this point!
tail_3_coldStreak_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'The deck is just BULLYING them now!' — swaps 'at this point' for 'now.'

tail_3_coldStreak_2.text: A collapse in REAL TIME, people!

tail_3_coldStreak_3.text: Someone take the scorecard away — this is a CRIME SCENE!
tail_3_coldStreak_3.suggestion: Trim to: 'Someone tape off this CRIME SCENE!' — cuts 'take the scorecard away... this is.'

tail_3_coldStreak_5.text: The wheels came OFF three exits ago!

tail_3_bigRound_0.text: That wasn't a round — that was a STATEMENT!
tail_3_bigRound_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'That wasn't a round — a STATEMENT!' — cuts the repeated 'that was.'

tail_3_bigRound_1.text: DETONATION! The whole table felt that one!

tail_3_zeroSpecialist_1.text: Doing NOTHING and getting PAID! Criminal!

tail_3_boldestBidder_0.text: The audacity! The HUBRIS! The inevitable DISASTER!

tail_3_boldestBidder_1.text: Betting the farm AGAIN! Somebody stop them!

tail_3_winner_0.text: TOTAL DOMINATION! The rest of you were DECORATION!
tail_3_winner_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'TOTAL DOMINATION! The rest were DECORATION!' — drops 'of you.'

tail_3_lastPlace_0.text: Last place! We are still LOOKING for the strategy, folks!
tail_3_lastPlace_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Last place! Still looking for a strategy!' — cuts 'we are... folks.'

tail_3_lastPlace_1.text: Dead last! The announcer's union says I don't have to talk about it!
tail_3_lastPlace_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Dead last! My union won't let me elaborate!' — this was the single wordiest tail in the whole set (13 words); cuts it nearly in half.

tail_4_leadChange_0.text: The throne has been STOLEN — deal with it!
tail_4_leadChange_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'The throne got STOLEN — deal with it!' — 'got' instead of 'has been.'

tail_4_leadChange_1.text: New leader! The old one should be embarrassed!
tail_4_leadChange_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'New leader! The old one's embarrassed!' — contracts 'should be' out entirely.

tail_4_nosedive_1.text: Somebody check on that score — it's not moving!
tail_4_nosedive_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Somebody check that score — it's not moving!' — drops 'on.'

tail_4_everybodyHit_0.text: Everyone hit?! Fine. FINE. Show-offs, all of you!
tail_4_everybodyHit_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Everyone hit?! Fine. Show-offs, all of you!' — cuts the repeated 'FINE.'

tail_4_everybodyHit_1.text: All hits! Who let the table get good?!
tail_4_everybodyHit_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'All hits?! Who let y'all get good?!' — 'y'all' replaces 'the table.'

tail_4_carnage_0.text: A damn BLOODBATH! Avert your eyes!

tail_4_carnage_1.text: The deck said NO to everyone tonight!

tail_4_tightRace_0.text: Too close! Somebody's heart is getting broken!

tail_4_kickoff_0.text: Deal the damn cards — destiny is waiting!

tail_4_kickoff_1.text: Round one! Try not to blow it immediately!
tail_4_kickoff_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Round one! Try not to blow it!' — drops 'immediately.'

tail_4_chasing_0.text: Coming for the throne — and the leader KNOWS it!
tail_4_chasing_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Coming for the throne — leader KNOWS it!' — drops 'and the.'

tail_4_chasing_1.text: The gap is shrinking, people! PANIC!

tail_4_chasing_2.text: Hunting the leader like rent is due!

tail_4_chasing_3.text: One good round from a damn coup!

tail_4_trailing_0.text: Dead last — somebody stage a damn rescue!

tail_4_trailing_1.text: The basement called. They want rent!

tail_4_trailing_2.text: The basement has their mail forwarded now!

tail_4_trailing_3.text: Last place called — it's getting crowded down there!
tail_4_trailing_3.suggestion: Trim to: 'Last place called — it's getting crowded!' — drops 'down there.'

tail_4_leading_0.text: Leading, and frankly? Insufferable about it!

tail_4_leading_1.text: First place! The rest of you should be embarrassed!
tail_4_leading_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'First place! The rest of you — yikes!' — cuts 'should be embarrassed' for a punchier tag.

tail_4_leading_2.text: On top and rubbing everyone's nose in it!
tail_4_leading_2.suggestion: Trim to: 'On top and rubbing it in hard!' — drops 'everyone's nose.'

tail_4_leading_3.text: Leading like it's a damn birthright!

tail_4_reigningChamp_0.text: The champ is HERE — act like it matters, people!
tail_4_reigningChamp_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'The champ is HERE — act like it!' — drops trailing 'people' and 'matters.'

tail_4_reigningChamp_1.text: Defending champion! Somebody take them down a damn peg!
tail_4_reigningChamp_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Defending champion! Somebody take them down!' — cuts 'a damn peg.'

tail_4_freshGame_0.text: New game! Try not to embarrass yourselves this time!
tail_4_freshGame_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'New game! Try not to embarrass yourselves!' — drops 'this time.'

tail_4_freshGame_1.text: Clean slate — and some of you need it, BADLY!
tail_4_freshGame_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Clean slate — you need it BADLY!' — drops 'and some of.'

tail_4_perfect_0.text: Perfect AGAIN! The rest of you should be ASHAMED!
tail_4_perfect_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Perfect AGAIN! The rest of you — ASHAMED!' — cuts 'should be.'

tail_4_perfect_1.text: Good LORD! Just hand over the trophy already!
tail_4_perfect_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Good LORD! Just hand over the trophy!' — drops 'already.'

tail_4_perfect_2.text: Perfect — and completely insufferable about it!

tail_4_perfect_3.text: Not a single damn mistake yet!

tail_4_hotStreak_0.text: ANOTHER hit! This is getting disrespectful as hell!
tail_4_hotStreak_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'ANOTHER hit! This is disrespectful as hell!' — drops 'getting.'

tail_4_hotStreak_3.text: Hot enough to fry an egg on that scorecard!
tail_4_hotStreak_3.suggestion: Trim to: 'Hot enough to fry that scorecard!' — cuts 'an egg on.'

tail_4_coldStreak_1.text: What the HELL was that bid?!

tail_4_coldStreak_2.text: A five-year-old with a juice box saw that coming!
tail_4_coldStreak_2.suggestion: Trim to: 'A five-year-old saw that coming!' — cuts 'with a juice box' (funny image, but this was the wordiest line in bucket 4 at 11 words).

tail_4_coldStreak_4.text: A slow-motion car crash, and we CAN'T look away!
tail_4_coldStreak_4.suggestion: Trim to: 'A slow-motion car crash — can't look away!' — drops 'and we.'

tail_4_bigRound_0.text: A damn MASTERPIECE of a round!

tail_4_bigRound_1.text: Pack it up, everyone. Pack it ALL up.
tail_4_bigRound_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Pack it up — ALL of it!' — cuts the repeated 'Pack it' clause.

tail_4_zeroSpecialist_0.text: Another zero — living their best damn life!

tail_4_zeroSpecialist_1.text: Doing nothing and STILL beating half this table!
tail_4_zeroSpecialist_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Doing nothing — STILL beating half the table!' — swaps 'and' for a dash.

tail_4_boldestBidder_0.text: That bid is an INSULT to everyone who has ever held cards!
tail_4_boldestBidder_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'That bid INSULTS everyone who's ever played!' — this was the wordiest tail in bucket 4 (12 words); cuts it by half.

tail_4_boldestBidder_1.text: Bidding like rent is due TONIGHT!

tail_4_winner_0.text: It's OVER! And it wasn't even CLOSE, was it?!
tail_4_winner_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'It's OVER! And it wasn't even CLOSE!' — drops the tacked-on 'was it?!'

tail_4_winner_1.text: The winner! The rest of you made damn good television!
tail_4_winner_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'The winner! Rest of you — great TV!' — cuts 'made damn good television' down to size.

tail_4_lastPlace_0.text: Dead last. At this point it's not luck — it's a personality trait!
tail_4_lastPlace_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Dead last. Not luck — a personality trait!' — this was tied for the wordiest tail in the set (12 words); cuts the 'it's not... it's' scaffolding.

tail_4_lastPlace_1.text: Last place AGAIN! The family is WATCHING!

tail_5_leadChange_1.text: NEW leader — and the trash talk writes itself!
tail_5_leadChange_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'NEW leader — the trash talk writes itself!' — drops 'and.'

tail_5_nosedive_1.text: That round beat their ass fair and square!
tail_5_nosedive_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'That round kicked their ass, clean!' — drops 'fair and square' for a punchier tag.

tail_5_everybodyHit_1.text: A perfect round?! Get the hell out of here!
tail_5_everybodyHit_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'A perfect round?! Get outta here!' — drops 'the hell... of.'

tail_5_carnage_0.text: An absolute SHIT-SHOW of a round!

tail_5_tightRace_1.text: This race is TOO damn tight!

tail_5_kickoff_0.text: Shuffle up — and let the shit-show BEGIN!
tail_5_kickoff_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Shuffle up — let the shit-show BEGIN!' — drops 'and.'

tail_5_chasing_1.text: The leader's ass is officially on notice!

tail_5_chasing_2.text: Coming up fast with bad intentions!

tail_5_chasing_3.text: About to ruin somebody's whole damn night!

tail_5_trailing_0.text: Stone. Cold. LAST. Get your shit together!

tail_5_trailing_1.text: Living in the basement rent-free — and it SHOWS!
tail_5_trailing_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Living in the basement, rent-free!' — cuts the tacked-on 'and it SHOWS.'

tail_5_trailing_2.text: Dead last and somehow still confident!

tail_5_leading_0.text: On TOP! Somebody knock their ass off the throne!
tail_5_leading_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'On TOP! Somebody knock 'em off!' — drops 'their ass... the throne.'

tail_5_leading_2.text: Sitting on the throne like they own the place!
tail_5_leading_2.suggestion: Trim to: 'Sitting on the throne, owning it!' — cuts 'like they... the place.'

tail_5_leading_3.text: Top of the pile and talking SO much shit!
tail_5_leading_3.suggestion: Trim to: 'Top of the pile, talking shit!' — drops 'SO much' intensifier.

tail_5_reigningChamp_0.text: The CHAMP is back — and the trash talk is EARNED!
tail_5_reigningChamp_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'The CHAMP is back — trash talk EARNED!' — drops 'and the... is.'

tail_5_reigningChamp_1.text: Reigning champion! Someone knock their ass off!

tail_5_freshGame_0.text: FRESH game! Zero points, zero shits given — let's GO!
tail_5_freshGame_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'FRESH game! Zero points, zero shits given!' — drops the tacked-on 'let's GO.'

tail_5_freshGame_1.text: New scorepad, same suspects — let the beatdown begin!
tail_5_freshGame_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'New scorepad, same suspects — beatdown begins!' — drops 'let the... begin' scaffolding.

tail_5_perfect_0.text: STILL perfect! You have GOT to be shitting me!
tail_5_perfect_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'STILL perfect! You're shitting me!' — same punch, way fewer words.

tail_5_perfect_1.text: UNREAL! Somebody frisk this player — I am dead serious!
tail_5_perfect_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'UNREAL! Somebody frisk this player — dead serious!' — cuts 'I am.'

tail_5_perfect_2.text: Still perfect — this is bullshit-tier luck!

tail_5_perfect_3.text: Flawless! Check the sleeves, check the SHOES!

tail_5_hotStreak_0.text: ANOTHER one! This is bullshit-level lucky, folks!
tail_5_hotStreak_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'ANOTHER one! Bullshit-level lucky, folks!' — drops 'this is.'

tail_5_hotStreak_1.text: On FIRE! The rest of this table is getting its ass KICKED!
tail_5_hotStreak_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'On FIRE! This whole table's getting KICKED!' — this was the wordiest tail in the entire set (12 words); cuts it nearly in half.

tail_5_hotStreak_3.text: An absolute WRECKING BALL right now!

tail_5_coldStreak_0.text: That was a shit bid and EVERYBODY at this table knew it!
tail_5_coldStreak_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Everybody knew that bid was shit!' — this was tied for the wordiest tail in the set (12 words); cuts the 'and... at this table' scaffolding.

tail_5_coldStreak_1.text: Holy hell — someone stage an intervention!

tail_5_coldStreak_2.text: Get your shit together — the FAMILY is watching!
tail_5_coldStreak_2.suggestion: Trim to: 'Get your shit together — FAMILY's watching!' — contracts 'the... is' to 's.'

tail_5_coldStreak_3.text: How?! HOW does that keep happening?!

tail_5_coldStreak_5.text: The cards have personally declared war!

tail_5_bigRound_1.text: That is a whole-ass BEATDOWN in one hand!
tail_5_bigRound_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'That's a whole-ass BEATDOWN, one hand!' — contracts 'That is' and drops 'in.'

tail_5_zeroSpecialist_0.text: Zero called, zero taken, zero shits given! LEGEND!
tail_5_zeroSpecialist_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Zero called, zero taken, zero shits! LEGEND!' — drops 'given.'

tail_5_boldestBidder_0.text: That bid?! BALLS of solid brass, folks!

tail_5_boldestBidder_1.text: Betting like a maniac with NOTHING to lose!
tail_5_boldestBidder_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Betting like a maniac, NOTHING to lose!' — drops 'with.'

tail_5_winner_0.text: IT'S OVER! An ass-kicking for the AGES!
tail_5_winner_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'IT'S OVER! What an ass-kicking!' — drops 'for the AGES.'

tail_5_winner_1.text: CHAMPION! The rest of you got absolutely WRECKED!
tail_5_winner_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'CHAMPION! The rest of you got WRECKED!' — drops 'absolutely.'

tail_5_lastPlace_0.text: Dead. Ass. LAST. Someone drive them home!

tail_5_lastPlace_1.text: This is an intervention. We love you. But DAMN!
tail_5_lastPlace_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'An intervention. We love you. But DAMN!' — drops the throat-clearing 'This is.'

seg_1_intro_0.text: Let's check in on the table!

seg_2_intro_0.text: Round update, and we have some notes!

seg_2_outro_0.text: Deal 'em up — and try to do better!
seg_2_outro_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Deal 'em up — do better!' — drops 'and try to.'

seg_2_outro_1.text: Back to the table. Some of you have work to do!
seg_2_outro_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Back to the table — get to work!' — this was the wordiest connective in the whole set (11 words); cuts it by a third.

seg_3_intro_0.text: ROUND UPDATE! Somebody's getting called OUT!

seg_3_intro_1.text: STOP the presses — you need to hear this!
seg_3_intro_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'STOP the presses — hear THIS!' — drops 'you need to.'

seg_3_intro_2.text: EMERGENCY meeting — look at this scorepad!

seg_3_outro_1.text: That's the damage — back to WAR!

seg_4_intro_0.text: Round update — and my GOD, where do I start?!
seg_4_intro_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Round update — where do I even START?!' — drops 'and my GOD.'

seg_4_intro_1.text: Gather round for the damage report!

seg_4_trans_1.text: And as if that wasn't enough...

seg_4_trans_3.text: And because the universe is cruel...

seg_4_outro_0.text: Update over. Some of you should reflect on your damn choices!
seg_4_outro_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'Update over. Reflect on your damn choices!' — this was the wordiest connective in bucket 4 (11 words); cuts 'some of you should' scaffolding.

seg_4_outro_1.text: Back to it — and for the love of GOD, bid better!
seg_4_outro_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Back to it — bid better, dammit!' — this was tied for the wordiest connective in the whole set (11 words); cuts 'and for the love of GOD.'

seg_4_outro_2.text: Back at it — and for God's sake, do better!

seg_5_intro_0.text: ROUND UPDATE! Buckle the hell up!

seg_5_intro_1.text: Holy shit, folks, what a round — let's break it down!
seg_5_intro_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Holy shit, folks — what a round!' — drops the redundant 'let's break it down.'

seg_5_intro_2.text: Strap in for the damn update!

seg_5_outro_0.text: That's the damn update! Play better, all of you!
seg_5_outro_0.suggestion: Trim to: 'That's the damn update! Play better!' — drops 'all of you.'

seg_5_outro_1.text: Back to the table — and NO more shit bids!
seg_5_outro_1.suggestion: Trim to: 'Back to the table — NO more shit bids!' — drops 'and.'

seg_5_outro_2.text: Now get back in there and raise hell!
seg_5_outro_2.suggestion: Trim to: 'Get back in there and raise hell!' — drops 'Now.'
